allow: Bash(node -e "const {parse} = require\('path'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); try { new Function\(fs.readFileSync\('module/helpers/roles.mjs','utf8'\).replace\(/^export /gm,''\).replace\(/^import.*$/gm,''\)\); console.log\('roles.mjs ok'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('roles.mjs ERR:', e.message\); } try { new Function\(fs.readFileSync\('module/documents/item.mjs','utf8'\).replace\(/^export /gm,''\).replace\(/^import.*$/gm,''\)\); console.log\('item.mjs ok'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('item.mjs ERR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./module/helpers/roles.mjs'\).then\(m => console.log\('roles OK, exports:', Object.keys\(m\).length\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('roles ERR:', e.message\)\)")
